clips.title: Stop posting at noon; shift to afternoon slots

clips.title: Cut posting from 1.9 to ~1.2 Shorts daily
clips.body: You're uploading 13 Shorts/week vs niche leaders' 7.7/week—your 343 avg views signals oversaturation. Your highest-performing content (1000+ views) like "Rakai Meets Kai Cenat" clusters around 2-3 day intervals. Reduce to 1-2 quality posts

stories.title: Extend Shorts from 49s to 70s minimum
stories.body: Niche leaders average ~77s while you're at ~49s—that's 28 seconds of untapped watch time. Extend your storytelling with more dramatic pauses, reaction shots, or dialogue; longer average view duration signals engagement to YouTube's algorith

stories.title: Shift posts to 14:00–20:00 UTC Central
